`SkipBlockProof::verify` computes its quorum check using `BitSet.len()`, then iterates `BitSet` indices and casts each `usize` index to `u16` (`slot as u16`) for slot lookup. If an attacker can get a `SkipBlockProof` verified where `MultiSignature.signers` contains out-of-range indices spaced by 65536, these indices inflate `len()` but collide onto the same in-range `u16` slot during aggregation.

This makes it possible for a malicious validator with far fewer than `2f+1` real signer slots to pass skip block proof verification by multiplying a single BLS signature by the same factor.

### Patches
[The patch for this vulnerability](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3657) is included as part of [v1.3.0](https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0).

### Workarounds
No known workarounds.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00217, "percentile": 0.1203}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6973-8887-87ff", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T19:13:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6973-8887-87ff", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6973-8887-87ff"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33471"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T20:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T19:13:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security/advisories/GHSA-6973-8887-87ff", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/pull/3657", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/commit/d02059053181ed8ddad6b59a0adfd661ef5cd823", "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/releases/tag/v1.3.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33471", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6973-8887-87ff"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nimiq/core-rs-albatross/security-advisories/GHSA-6973-8887-87ff", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nimiq/core-rs-albatross", "summary": "nimiq-block has skip block quorum bypass via out-of-range BitSet indices & u16 truncation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:22:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6973-8887-87ff", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "nimiq-block"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: nimiq-block has skip block quorum bypass via out-of-range BitSet indices & u16 truncation
